# Billing goctl Replay Rollback

If this transitive-import replay stops generating deterministic artifacts or
the generated module stops compiling, pin the previous gozero-compatible
generator profile and keep the last passing generated cache template.

Treat comment/tag parsing, Request/Response type naming, nested message
composition, unique-index finder generation, and complex model/cache output
changes as breaking candidates until a migration note classifies them as
compatible additions or generated cache template changes.
